creator: tonidasbabes88@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 242451
Patch to update monero-cli from 0.18.1.2 to 0.18.2.2

Hi

Since this port currently doesn't have a maintainer I'd like to submit a patch to upgrade monero-cli to 0.18.2.2.

I built it with poudriere on a 13.1p7 jail and I've been running it on a 13.2 system for a couple of days and everything seems to be working normally.
